gameDetails.name: SETI: Space Agencies – Space Agencies Promo Card
gameDetails.description:
Available as a promo card when pre-ordering SETI - Space Agencies.

The card has a cost of two credits, and it allows the player to launch a probe and to take a signal token. In addition, it reads:

The next time you play SETI with quick start cards, gain one extra card to choose from at the start of the game.
